name: Blondies
recipeInstructions: Melt butter in a saucepan. Stir the brown sugar into the butter until dissolved. Allow mixture to cool slightly, then beat in eggs and vanilla extract. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir dry ingredients into the butter/sugar/egg mixture. Butter a 9-inch square pan, line with wax paper, and then butter and flour the wax paper. Pour batter into the pan. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-45 minutes.
